title: End Flash Backport
description: End Flash Backport fork based on the original mod Copper Age Backport
body:
## Fork warning

> This project is an extracted and modified component from a larger original mod, [Copper Age Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/backport-copper-age) code credits to Smallinger.

> The original code is used in accordance with the terms of the MIT license and has been adapted and extended with new functionality.

## About

> The End flash is a new atmospheric event in the End that, when activated, illuminates the End’s surface with a purple hue and generates a distant explosion sound. The End flash activates periodically within a 30 second interval, and it is not visible while the Ender Dragon’s battle fog is active.
Sound subtitles are included for English (US), German (DE), French (FR), Spanish (SP and MX), and Portuguese (BR) (same from 1.21.9)

> It is not compatible with shaders or mods/resource packs that change the End skybox, (Enderscape, Better End etc) it will not cause a crash, but the End flash will not be rendered, or you can disable skyboxes in their respective configs.

>  If you want to edit the texture or sounds, use the "endflash" namespace.

## Configuration ⚙️


> This fork adds new configuration options for the end flash (still in beta):

> endflash-client

> endflash-common (server)
```

["End Flash"]
	#Enable or disable the End Flash effect
	enableEndFlash = true
	#Size of the End Flash
	# Default: 60.0
	# Range: 1.0 ~ 500.0
	flashScale = 60.0
	#Height of the End Flash in the sky
	# Default: 100.0
	# Range: 0.0 ~ 500.0
	flashHeight = 100.0
	#Intensity multiplier of the flash
	# Default: 1.0
	# Range: 0.1 ~ 5.0
	flashIntensity = 1.0
	#Time between each End Flash
	# Default: 600
	# Range: 20 ~ 2400
	flashIntervalTicks = 600
```
